content: Name: Robin Singh Rawat. Title: AI Integration Developer / Frontend Engineer. Focus: building AI-powered web apps and interfaces that make LLMs usable for real people.
Availability: open to remote opportunities.
Keywords/roles: AI Integration Developer; Frontend Engineer; LLM App Builder; Open to Remote.
Summary: AI Integration Developer with 5 years of experience building fast, scalable applications using React, Next.js, Angular, and TypeScript.
Background: moved from Senior Frontend Engineer into AI specialization with a focus on making Large Language Models accessible and useful in real-world products.
Current learning: completing the Outskill AI Accelerator program covering RAG systems, prompt engineering, and LLM orchestration.
Quick stats: 5 years experience, 10+ projects completed, 10+ satisfied clients.

Technical skills include: Angular, React, Next.js, React Native, TypeScript, JavaScript, Redux, Zustand, Tan Stack, Tailwind, Material UI, RESTful APIs, Jest, HTML, CSS, WebSockets, Git, Unit Testing, RxJS.
AI and LLM tools include: OpenAI API, Claude API, LangChain, Prompt Engineering, AI Automation, n8n, RAG Systems, Hugging Face.
Tools & platforms include: Postman, ClickUp, Jira, Mend, Figma, Android Studio, VS Code, Antigravity, Chrome DevTools, GitHub, GitLab, Sentry, Vercel/Netlify, Lighthouse, AWS.
Q: What does Robin work with? A: React, Next.js, Angular, TypeScript, AI/LLM integrations (RAG, automation), and modern UI tooling (Tailwind, Material UI).
Arth Impact — Software Engineer (09/2025 - 01/2026). Domain: fintech solutions.

Arth Impact highlights: built responsive fintech dashboards + loan management modules (React, Next.js, Angular); dynamic forms; reusable UI logic via custom hooks; integrated loan/customer/payment APIs; improved UI consistency (Material UI, Angular Material); enhanced React Native Android UI components and API-driven workflows.
Builder.AI — Software Engineer (01/2021 - 04/2025). Focus: building web apps and scalable frontend architecture.

Builder.AI performance: delivered 10+ responsive web apps (Angular 14+, React, Next.js, Tailwind, TypeScript) and improved average load speed by ~30%. Optimized performance using lazy loading + RxJS (bundle size -20%).

Builder.AI architecture & quality: helped convert monolithic frontend to microfrontend modules; integrated RESTful APIs and Redux state management (API reliability +40%); built reusable components (dev time -25%); maintained 85%+ Jest test coverage; supported vulnerability scans for SLA compliance.
Education: Bachelor of Computer Applications, Hindu Institute of Management (Aug 2016 – May 2019).
Certification/Program: AI Accelerator Program (Outskill, 2026) — specialization in AI integration, LLM orchestration, RAG architectures, and building production-ready AI applications.

Certification/Program: Advance Program in Full Stack Software Engineering (NIIT, July 2020, 216 hours) — end-to-end full stack development including frontend frameworks, backend architecture, and database management.

Project: Builder Studio — No-Code App Development Platform (01/2021 - 04/2025). Contributed to a low-code drag-and-drop app builder. Built dynamic component-based UIs with Angular/TypeScript. Delivered modules like form builders, logic flow engines, and pricing configuration. Integrated REST APIs for automation, cost estimation, and live previews. Ensured responsive cross-browser design.

Project: Builder Tracker — Real-Time Project Tracking Dashboard (01/2021 - 04/2025). Engineered dashboards with Angular and RxJS for live sync. Built interactive timelines, summary cards, and real-time status views. Used WebSocket integration for instant updates. Implemented motion effects and responsive UI guided by Figma prototypes.

Project: Builder Home — User Onboarding & Account Portal (01/2021 - 04/2025). Built a management dashboard for projects, teams, subscriptions, and account settings. Used React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind. Implemented secure auth, role-based access, and onboarding flows. Built reusable components, used lazy loading for performance, maintained 85%+ Jest unit test coverage.

Q: What kind of projects has Robin worked on? A: Enterprise platforms and dashboards such as Builder Studio (no-code app builder), Builder Tracker (real-time dashboard), and Builder Home (onboarding & account portal).
Services offered: Starter Website; Enterprise Web Application; AI Workflow Automation; Custom Chatbot; Custom Voice Assistant; RAG System / Knowledge Base AI.
Coming soon service: AI Content Pipeline (automated content generation workflows for video, copy, and social).
Service: Starter Website — clean, fast websites and landing pages for individuals and small businesses.
Service: Enterprise Web Application — scalable, full-stack web apps built for complex business needs.
Service: AI Workflow Automation — end-to-end automation pipelines that eliminate manual, repetitive work.
Service: Custom Chatbot — intelligent chatbots for websites, WhatsApp, and customer support.
Service: Custom Voice Assistant — AI-powered voice agents for sales, support, and operations.
Service: RAG System / Knowledge Base AI — smart document Q&A and internal knowledge search systems.
Start a Project form fields: name, email, phone, selected services, budget range, and an optional message.
Budget options include: Less than $500; $500 – $2,000; $2,000 – $5,000; $5,000+; Not sure yet.
Contact details: Email robinrawat37@gmail.com. Phone +91-9416149624. Location Sonipat, Haryana, India (open to remote).
Q: How do I contact Robin? A: Email robinrawat37@gmail.com or WhatsApp +91-9416149624. Location: Sonipat, Haryana, India (open to remote).

Social links: LinkedIn (robinrawat1), GitHub (robinrawat007), X/Twitter (robinrawat37), Instagram (robinrawat01), WhatsApp (+91-9416149624), Newsletter (thestackshift.beehiiv.com), Booking (topmate.io/robin_singh_rawat).
Footer branding: Robin Singh Rawat. Navigation anchors include About, Experience, Projects, Skills, Services. Copyright © current year.
